page.title: gout — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for gout: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for gout: 114 alterations and 186 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

alterations.name: ABCA6
alterations.definition: ATP binding cassette subfamily A member 6

alterations.name: ABCG2
alterations.definition: ATP binding cassette subfamily G member 2 (JR blood group)

alterations.name: Area Under the Plasma Concentration Versus Time Curve (AUC 0-last) - Dotinurad DDI PK Analysis
Area Under the Plasma Concentration Versus Time Curve (AUC 0-last) - Dotinurad PK Analysis
BCAS3
alterations.definition: BCAS3 microtubule associated cell migration factor

alterations.name: Changes in hematology, serum chemistry, coagulation, electrocardiogram and urinalysis parameters
Changes in vital signs and physical examination findings
DNAJC13
alterations.definition: DnaJ heat shock protein family (Hsp40) member C13

alterations.name: Evaluate clinically significant changes from baseline in physical examinations
Evaluate incidence and severity of adverse eventsadministration in healthy adult subjects.
Evaluate the pharmacokinetic of maximum plasma concentration
FAM53B
alterations.definition: family with sequence similarity 53 member B

alterations.name: HECTD4
alterations.definition: HECT domain E3 ubiquitin protein ligase 4

alterations.name: HLF
alterations.definition: HLF transcription factor, PAR bZIP family member

alterations.name: Incidence of treatment-emergent adverse events (Safety and Tolerability)
NR3C1
alterations.definition: nuclear receptor subfamily 3 group C member 1

alterations.name: PK of PRX-115: Area under the plasma concentration versus time curve (AUC 0-t)
PKD2
alterations.definition: polycystin 2, transient receptor potential cation channel

alterations.name: PRKAG2
alterations.definition: protein kinase AMP-activated non-catalytic subunit gamma 2

alterations.name: Pharmacokinetics (Peak time (Tmax) of Genakumab Injection with Genakumab for Injection
SFMBT1
alterations.definition: Scm like with four mbt domains 1

alterations.name: SOS2
alterations.definition: SOS Ras/Rho guanine nucleotide exchange factor 2

disclaimer: Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
